name: Mind Engraving
descriptionTemplate: After using {Keyflare Rouse}, consume an additional [Arg1] Keyflare, reducing the Arithmetica Cost of the received {Rouse} card to 0. Upon playing, the corresponding Awakener gains an additional [Arg2] Aliemus.
lore: The ancient tribe believed that engraving special symbols on the skulls of the dead could keep their souls for eternal companionship.
